articles.title: Watch: Explained: What is Euthanasia?
articles.description: India’s Supreme Court has recognised passive euthanasia and the right to die with dignity, but the debate around assisted dying continues across the world. In this video, we explain what euthanasia means, the Harish Rana judgement in India, and the difference between active and passive euthanasia. The video also explores why end-of-life decisions are debated in law and ethics, and how different countries regulate assisted dying.

articles.title: Nancy Guthrie case update: Unidentified body found in Tucson desert; foul play suspected in disappearance
articles.description: Nancy Guthrie, missing since 1 February, is the subject of an FBI investigation following her suspected abduction. A body found in Tucson is unlikely to be hers. Savannah Guthrie and family are actively seeking information, offering a $1 million reward as authorities intensify their search efforts.

topStories.title: Sole Muslim woman on White House religious committee resigns over Trump administration’s ‘illegal war against Iran’
topStories.description: Sameerah Munshi resigned from her role on President Trump's Religious Liberty Commission, citing injustice and opposition to the administration's actions in Iran. She highlighted the killing of civilians and expressed her unwillingness to be associated with the commission any longer.

dailyNews.title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
dailyNews.description: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.

dailyNews.title: After Trump, Netanyahu issues 'no life insurance' warning to Mojtaba Khamenei: 'We’re not waiting'
dailyNews.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu warned Iran's new supreme leader, Ayotallah Mojtaba Khamenei, that Jerusalem is ‘initiating, attacking’. This follows US President Donald Trump's warning of potential elimination if Mojtaba does not comply with demands regarding Tehran's nuclear programme.

dailyNews.title: 4 crew aboard refueling aircraft crashed in Iraq killed, says US Central Command, denies hostile or friendly fire
dailyNews.description: Four crew members of a KC-135 refueling aircraft have died following its crash in western Iraq. The US military stated the loss was not due to hostile or friendly fire, as investigations continue amidst heightened military activity in the region.

dailyNews.title: Video shows projectile near Turkish base hosting US troops
dailyNews.description: Video shared on social media shows a projectile streaking across the sky near the Incirlik military base in Turkiye.

dailyNews.title: Terms Of Trade: World’s caught in a Catch-22 situation between Trump and US
dailyNews.description: Trump’s Iran war decision exposes a collapsing world order as US power, global stability and the Strait of Hormuz face mounting economic, geopolitical risks

dailyNews.title: Elderly man, 66, dies after 2-hour wait in LPG cylinder queue amid supply shortage: Report
dailyNews.description: A 66-year-old man in Punjab's Barnala district allegedly died of a heart attack while waiting for an LPG cylinder for 2 hours amid supply shortages due to the Middle East conflict.  A Congress leader blamed the government for the tragic circumstances.

dailyNews.title: Metal stocks slide up to 7% as dollar hits 4-month high; NALCO, Hindustan Copper lead fall
dailyNews.description: Metal stocks, including NALCO and Hindustan Copper fell sharply on Friday as a surging US Dollar Index and ongoing Iran–Israel/US conflict dented demand. Analysts advise caution, noting that global commodity prices and infrastructure trends will shape near-term metal sector performance.

dailyNews.title: Sri Lanka to repatriate remains of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US attack
dailyNews.description: The 32 sailors who were rescued by Sri Lanka's navy will remain in the island nation, said the Foreign Ministry.

dailyNews.title: Explosions near Tehran al-Quds Day march in solidarity with Palestinians
dailyNews.description: Thousands across Iran join rallies in solidarity with Palestine, chanting against Israel and the United States.

dailyNews.title: Four killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq, military confirms
dailyNews.description: The US Central Command says rescue efforts continue after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

dailyNews.title: Rahul Gandhi spreading misinformation on energy issue, says Giriraj Singh
dailyNews.description: Rahul Gandhi said in the Lok Sabha that the war between the U.S. and Israel, and Iran is going to have far-reaching consequences

dailyNews.title: 4 more U.S. deaths, vague threat from Trump as Iran war nears 2-week mark
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military says four service members were killed in a plane crash in Iraq, as Iran's continued attacks on Gulf states keep oil prices high.

dailyNews.title: Cuba's leader Miguel Diaz-Canel confirms talks with U.S. underway
dailyNews.description: Cuban leader Miguel Diaz-Canel confirmed Friday that Cuban officials recently held conversations with the President Donald Trump's administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump says to "watch what happens" as Iran war enters second week
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media Friday, warning to "watch what happens" as the Iran war enters a second week. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata has more as more details emerge about four more U.S. military deaths.

dailyNews.title: Democratic senators file war powers resolution to try to restrain Trump on Cuba
dailyNews.description: Senate Democrats have filed legislation hat would keep the U.S. from attacking Cuba without congressional approval as they seek to force a vote on President Trump's stated goal of a "takeover" of the Caribbean country.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration allows purchase of Russian oil already at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is temporarily allowing the purchase of Russian oil that's already at sea, in the Trump administration's latest move to loosen sanctions on Russia's oil industry as the world grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: 14 million doses of fentanyl  seized from secret drug lab in Mexico
dailyNews.description: The raids come as President Donald Trump ramps up his criticism of Mexico's record on fighting drug trafficking.

dailyNews.title: Iran war disrupts global oil trade as Trump administration prepares to escort ships
dailyNews.description: Iran's relentless attacks on Gulf states and infrastructure appear to be overshadowing interventions by the U.S. and its allies aimed at easing energy prices.

dailyNews.title: A Weakened Iran Hits Back by Strangling the Vital Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The threats to shipping in the Strait of Hormuz are complicating President Trump’s calculations about how and when to end the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump Removes Sanctions on Russian Oil, and Chatbots Want Your Health Records
dailyNews.description: Plus, the Friday news quiz.

dailyNews.title: Cuba Acknowledges Talks with Trump Officials For the First Time
dailyNews.description: Facing a massive energy crisis and increasing protests on the streets, the Cuban government acknowledged that it had entered into negotiations with the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: When a President Gets Addicted to Regime Change
dailyNews.description: Venezuela gave Trump a taste of success. This isn’t the first time an American president has gotten hooked on overthrowing foreign governments.

dailyNews.title: Canada Plans Military Expansion in Arctic, Following Trump Threats
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Canada would build three bases in the region. The government also plans to improve infrastructure and airports in the north.
